overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character in a green jacket walking through a dimly lit apartment building hallway, opening door 312, and entering a vintage-furnished room with natural light filtering through curtained windows. The atmosphere is tense and moody with desaturated colors typical of psychological horror games.

scene_state.functional_zone: dimly lit apartment hallway with patterned wallpaper

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the hallway toward door 312 at the end of the corridor

entered.detail: brown patterned wallpaper covering both walls of the corridor
domed ceiling light providing dim illumination
blue covered cart or trolley sitting in the middle of the hallway
illuminated green exit sign mounted on the right wall
dark wooden door at the end of the hallway

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a narrow, dimly lit hallway with brown patterned wallpaper. A blue linen cart sits in the distance and an exit sign glows green on the right wall as the character approaches door 312 at the end of the corridor.

events.description: character reaches out and opens the wooden door to room 312
character steps from the hallway into the interior room space

agents.ego_description: stopping at the door, opening it, and stepping across the threshold into the room

entered.detail: gold-colored room number plaque reading 312 on the door
white painted door frame surrounding the entrance
wall-mounted light switch next to the door

segments.scene_description: The character stops at door 312, opens it, and steps through the doorway. The door plaque and frame become prominent as the hallway elements are left behind, revealing the dark interior of the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: vintage furnished room with large windows

events.description: natural daylight from windows becomes visible, mixing with interior shadows

agents.ego_description: walking into the room and looking toward the windows and vintage television set

entered.detail: old CRT television on a wooden stand in the center of the room
tall windows with lace curtains allowing diffused natural light
upholstered armchair with wooden frame positioned near the window
framed picture hanging on the wall between the windows
ceiling light fixture in the room

segments.scene_description: Inside the room, natural light filters through curtained windows illuminating a vintage television set on a stand. The character moves toward the center of the room, leaving the doorway behind, revealing upholstered furniture and wall decorations in the mixed lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, dimly lit corridor into a spacious, vintage-furnished room. It begins by trailing a character down a narrow hallway with brown patterned wallpaper, passing a blue linen cart and a glowing green exit sign. As the character reaches the end of the corridor, the camera focuses on the plaque of door 312 before following the character through the doorway and into a dark interior. The scene then opens up as the camera moves toward the center of the room, where natural light filters through curtained windows to illuminate an old television set and upholstered furniture.
